name: Blessing
effect: Increase the production of Heaven's Gates based on time spent with at least one active spell this Reincarnation.
formula: (80 + 8 * x^0.8)%, where x = time with active spell this Reincarnation

name: Inflame
effect: Increase the production of all other buildings by 160% per Infernal Realm built this Era.
formula: ×160% per Infernal Realm built

name: Cursing
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on offline production bonus.
formula: (ln(1+x)^2.5)%, where x = offline production bonus multiplier

name: Hallowing
effect: Increase FC find chance based on Training Grounds built.
formula: +(2 * x^1.5), where x = Training Grounds built

name: Transfixion
effect: Increase clicking reward based on spells cast this game.
formula: (3 * x^0.7)%, where x = spells cast this game

name: Illumination
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on Gems owned.
formula: +(5 + 0.05 * ln(1+x)^1.5), where x = Gems owned

name: Retribution
effect: Increase FC find chance additively based on Research Points and multiplicatively by 50%.
formula: +(5 * x^0.75), where x = Research Points

name: Resurrection
effect: Gain assistants based on God's Hand activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2.5 * x^0.75), where x = God's Hand activity time this Reincarnation

name: Transcendence
effect: Decrease cost of all spells by 20% and increase their duration by 20%.

name: Communion
requirement: 333 Holy Lights (Total this R), Research Gemcutting (C175) & Illumination (D135)
effect: Increase Holy Light duration based on time spent this Era. Also multiplicatively increase autoclick power by 10%.
formula: +(2 * x^0.7), where x = time this Era

name: Weather Control
effect: Increase the production of Enchanted Fields based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (2.5 * x^0.8)%, where x = Maximum Mana

name: Sanctification
requirement: 3 hours Spiritual Surge activity time (This R), Research Soulweaving (A175) & Necromancy (S225)
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on Non-Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (2.5 * x^0.55)%, where x = Non-Unique Buildings owned

name: Demonology
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = FC found this Era

name: Mutation
effect: Increase the production of all other buildings by 95% per Sunken City owned.
formula: ×160% per Sunken City built

name: Meditation
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on current Mana. Also increases offline spell cast amount multiplicatively by 300%.
formula: (0.35 * x^0.35 + 0.035 * log(x)^3.5), where x = Max Mana

name: Transubstantiation
effect: Each artifact found increases Maximum Mana additively and multiplicatively.
formula: Additive: +(50 * x^1.1); Mult: (x^0.95)%; x = artifacts found

name: Deliverance
effect: Increase assistant production based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (20 * x^0.8)%, where x = Mana Regeneration

name: Eternity
effect: Double the duration of all faction spells.

name: Descent
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Olympian Halls built.
formula: (0.2 * x^0.8)%, where x = Olympian Halls built

name: Miracle
effect: Increase production of a random building based on mana produced this Era. Target changes every 2 minutes. Offline: all buildings +12,000%.
formula: (2.75 * ln(1+x)^2.75)%, where x = mana produced this Era

name: Devotion
requirement: 1 hour Diamond Pickaxe activity time (This Game)
effect: Reduce Holy Light cost by 50%. Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on Holy Light duration.
formula: (6 + 0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Holy Light duration

name: Mercy
requirement: 30 minutes as each Good, Evil and Neutral alignment (This R)
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique Buildings based on time spent as your least used alignment this Reincarnation.
formula: (80 + 40 * x^0.8)%, where x = least used alignment time this Reincarnation

name: Purity
requirement: 1.5 hours as Good (This R), Research Communion (D205) & Devotion (D435)
effect: While Holy Light is active, increase production of all buildings based on Faction spells cast this Era.
formula: (15 * x^0.75)%, where x = Faction spells cast this Era

name: Ritualism
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on trophies unlocked.
formula: +(1.5 * x^0.85), where x = trophies unlocked

name: Dispelling
requirement: 200 Dwarf Exchanges as Dwangel, Research Shattering (W320) & Waste (A480)
effect: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (2 * ln(1+x)^2)%, where x = Mana Regeneration

name: Oblation
requirement: Any Neutral, build Dragon's Unique Building
effect: Increase the production of Wyrm's Den based on FC find chance.
formula: (1.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = FC find chance

name: Solemnity
effect: Increase production of Unique Buildings by +0.3% and Non-Unique Buildings by +3% per building of the same tier.
formula: +(0.3 * x)%, where x = buildings of same type

name: Soulrending
effect: Reincarnations count 50% more.

name: Intervention
effect: Increase production of Unique Buildings based on time spent with Mercenaries (All Time).
formula: (80 + 2 * x^0.8)%, where x = Mercenary time (All Time)

name: Vampirism
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on Offline Bonus.
formula: Additive: +(2.5 * ln(1+x)^2.5); Mult: (0.2 * ln(1+x)^2)%; x = Offline Bonus
